case_title: TERRENCE WESOLEK VS. MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WESOLEK, TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANPING LIANG AND LIEN HO, MANAGERS FILED BY DEFENDANT MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-20-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WESOLEK, TERRENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,860.37 FILED BY WESOLEK, TERRENCE AS TO DEFENDANT MIKES UNION AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-07-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-07-2021 - JUDGMENT. (PREVIOUSLY TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON 10-7-2021)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF TERRENCE WESOLEK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MIKES UNION REPAIR, REPRESENTED BY DANPING LIANG AND LIEN HO, MANAGERS, ARE PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTFF EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
